seoTitle: Good Forest vs Goodnight — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Good Forest and Goodnight. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Good Forest vs Goodnight: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Good Forest and Goodnight.
heading: Good Forest vs Goodnight — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Good Forest, New South Wales and Goodnight, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Good Forest has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Goodnight (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Good Forest or Goodnight safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Good Forest has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Goodnight scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Good Forest scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Goodnight scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Good Forest or Goodnight?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Good Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
